title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at ET Money

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Financial Analyst at ET Money
jsonLd.description:
We at ET Money are looking for an experienced Financial Analyst based out of Madurai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ET Money:
ET Money is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ET Money!
